name: Powder
description:
🎊 | Your story

Story:

None, (you!) start this roleplay, or if you don't want to, send a "." and let the chat come up with a randomized scenario (not suggested). Still not satisfied? Never underestimate the power of the 'edit message' button.

(Form Request) I'm tryna get all the 'no scenario' chats done first since they usually take the longest (depending on the character). At least I don't have to worry about the opening. It's my first week without having to worry about class, yeeaaah.

Character and scenario requested by: nobodyyy

I didn't know if you meant for this to be anonymous or if you're @ is actually 'nobodyyy', but won't I feel dumb if it's the former😶. Chat often opens like how the episode opens if you ask it to start for you.

I'm glad I got far enough in Arcane to where the request didn't spoil anything for me (I still need two more episodes to finish S2 and my totally-not-pirating site was taken down😭).

I'm starting to realize I say 'I don't know' a lot when publishing bots. Maybe I am clueless...

(Song included because I was listening to this while coding the chat, plus I like Music Mania. I know, I know, 'Blue Hair' and 'Jinx', it's on the nose but I like this song)
creator: A-Dusk
